inputs.prompt: Issue: Clearwater Analytics data breach — unauthorised access to one server containing local government financial data. 14 local authorities potentially affected. No evidence data was extracted. ICO notified. System patched. Independent cybersecurity audit commissioned. Approved to say: Breach identified, ICO notified, no evidence of data extraction, system secured, audit underway. Not approved: Cannot name specific local authorities affected until they have been notified individually. Cannot discuss the specific vulnerability exploited. Organisation: Clearwater Analytics.

Issue: An employee of a small charity was arrested for fraud. Organisation: Greenfield Community Trust. Approved to say: Aware of arrest, cooperating with police, employee suspended. Not approved: Cannot discuss the specific allegations or amounts.

Issue: Nordic Health Initiative clinical trial adverse reaction. A participant hospitalised after adverse reaction during a cross-border clinical trial. Trial paused in Denmark, Norway, and Sweden. National medicines agencies notified. Independent review panel established. Approved to say: One participant experienced adverse reaction, hospitalised and stable, trial paused as precaution, regulatory agencies notified, independent review commissioned. Not approved: Cannot identify the participant, the specific hospital, or the treatment protocol until the review is complete. Cannot speculate on whether the treatment caused the reaction. Organisation: Nordic Health Initiative.
